title: Item Zoomer
description: Zoom in on hovered items in the inventory.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23bc682e7cc7af0ab5a2c9dd6350b3b4479d64ff_0.webp)

**Item Zoomer** is a lightweight client-side mod that enhances your inventory experience by displaying a **large zoomed-in preview** of any item you're hovering over. It's especially useful in creative mode, modded inventories, or when you want to admire item details up close!



---

The mod features various intro and idle animations for the item preview:


<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YthxDrKlfaM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

Item Zoomer owes its inspiration entirely to **ItemZoom** and is being developed as its conceptual continuation.

Requires [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) to work.

---

Incompatibilities:
- VulkanMod
